meaning: n.[天] 毕宿五(金牛座中的一等星)
examples: We ear are fascinated by Mars, and might tend to overlook Aldebaran in tomorrow's morning scene.
He and others note that the Aldebaran rocket could be used to destroy satellites as well as launch them.
I confessed that I did not know which Aldebaran was-indeed, I had never even noticed that the stars were of different colours.
This investment from Intel Capital enables Aldebaran to become a key player in this nascent industry.
This is a big step for Aldebaran and its Nao line of humanoid robots.
